debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
fc : ContDiff ℝ 2 f
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
ε : ℝ
hε : ε > 0
hdiff : failed to pretty print expression (use 'set_option pp.rawOnError true' for raw representation)
mpb : mixed_partials_bounded f x
g₀ : ℝ → GlobalTheorem.E✝ n := GlobalTheorem.interpolator✝ n x y
g : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated✝ n x y f
g' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f
g'' : ℝ → ℝ := GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f
f_diff : Differentiable ℝ f
g₀_diff : Differentiable ℝ g₀
g_diff : Differentiable ℝ g
g'_diff : Differentiable ℝ g'
g'_cont : Continuous g'
g''_cont : Continuous g''
deriv_g_eq_g' : deriv g = g'
deriv_g'_eq_g'' : deriv g' = g''
int_g'_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g' s = g t - g 0
int_g''_eq_sub : ∀ (t : ℝ), ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s = g' t - g' 0
hobs : g 1 - g 0 = g' 0 + ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s
bound1 : |g' 0| ≤ ε * ∑ i, |nth_partial i f x|
bound2 : ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| ≤ ↑n ^ 2 / 2 * ε ^ 2
abs_int_le_int_abs : ∀ {t : ℝ}, 0 ≤ t → |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
⊢ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (t : ℝ) in 0..1, ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|

      intro t
      intro ht
      have ht0 : (0 : ℝ) ≤ t := le_trans (by norm_num) (le_of_lt ht.1)
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht0
    exact
      intervalIntegral.integral_mono_ae h01
        (intervalIntegrable_norm.2 <|
          (Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop : Continuous fun t => ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s) 0 1))
        (Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by fun_prop : Continuous fun t => ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|) 0 1)
        hmono

refine intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on ?hf ?hg ?hmono
    · intro t ht
      exact abs (∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s)
    · intro t ht
      exact ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs (t := t) ht.1

have hpoint :
        (∀ t ∈ Set.uIcc (0 : ℝ) 1, |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|) := by
      intro t ht
      have ht' : 0 ≤ t := by
        have : t ∈ Set.Icc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
          simpa [Set.uIcc] using ht
        exact this.1
      simpa using (abs_int_le_int_abs (t := t) ht')
    exact intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on hpoint

refine intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on ?h ?hi
    · intro t ht
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs (by simpa using ht.1)
    · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by
        have : Continuous fun t : ℝ => |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| := by fun_prop
        simpa using this) 0 1
    · exact Continuous.intervalIntegrable (by
        have : Continuous fun t : ℝ => ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| := by fun_prop
        simpa using this) 0 1

have hle :
        (fun t : ℝ => |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s|)
          ≤ᵐ[Measure.restrict volume (Set.uIcc (0 : ℝ) 1)]
            (fun t : ℝ => ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|) := by
      refine Filter.eventually_of_forall ?_
      intro t
      have ht : 0 ≤ t := by
        have ht' : t ∈ Set.uIcc (0 : ℝ) 1 := by
          simpa [Set.uIcc] using t.property
        exact ht'.1
      exact abs_int_le_int_abs ht
    have hint :
        IntervalIntegrable (fun t : ℝ => ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|) volume 0 1 :=
      by
        refine Continuous.intervalIntegrable ?_ 0 1
        fun_prop
    exact intervalIntegral.integral_mono_ae hint hle

have hpoint : ∀ t, |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| := by
      intro t
      by_cases ht : 0 ≤ t
      · simpa using abs_int_le_int_abs (t := t) ht
      · have hswap :
            |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in t..0, |g'' s| := by
          simpa [intervalIntegral.integral_symm] using
            abs_int_le_int_abs (t := 0) (by linarith : 0 ≤ (0 : ℝ))
        have hle : (∫ (s : ℝ) in t..0, |g'' s|) ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| := by
          simpa [intervalIntegral.integral_symm] using (le_of_eq (rfl : (∫ (s : ℝ) in t..0, |g'' s|) =
            -∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|))
        exact le_trans hswap hle
    have hint :
        IntervalIntegrable (fun t : ℝ => |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s|) volume 0 1 := by
      refine Continuous.intervalIntegrable ?_ 0 1
      fun_prop
    have hint' :
        IntervalIntegrable (fun t : ℝ => ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s|) volume 0 1 := by
      refine Continuous.intervalIntegrable ?_ 0 1
      fun_prop
    simpa using intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (a := (0 : ℝ)) (b := (1 : ℝ)) hint hint' hpoint

have hle : ∀ t, |∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, g'' s| ≤ ∫ (s : ℝ) in 0..t, |g'' s| := by
      intro t
      by_cases ht : 0 ≤ t
      · simpa using abs_int_le_int_abs (t := t) ht
      · simpa [intervalIntegral.integral_symm] using
          abs_int_le_int_abs (t := t) (by linarith)
    exact intervalIntegral.integral_mono_on (by
      intro t ht
      exact hle t)
